_instructions.description: Fill in all fields above with your actual information
_instructions.usage: Copy the values from personal_info, job_search, urls, and preferences sections into the 'User Config (Master Profile)' node in the n8n workflow
notes: skills: List your top technical/domain skills that you want to highlight in job matching
keywords: Use OR to combine multiple role names or keywords for broader job discovery (e.g., 'python developer OR backend engineer OR nodejs')
work_mode: Choose from 'remote', 'hybrid', or 'onsite'. You can include multiple options.
country: Use 2-letter ISO country code for Adzuna API (us=United States, gb=UK, in=India, au=Australia, ca=Canada, de=Germany, etc.)
min_salary: Set your minimum acceptable annual salary in USD or local currency. Jobs below this will score lower.
score_threshold: Minimum AI match score (0-100) required to save a job to your sheet. Start with 30 and adjust based on results.
daily_email_limit: Maximum number of outreach emails to send per day. Keep at 10 or lower to maintain good sender reputation.
resume_url: Make sure your Google Drive resume is set to 'Anyone with the link can view'
sheet_id: This is the long alphanumeric string in your Google Sheets URL between /d/ and /edit

where_to_update.location: Near the top-left of the workflow canvas, connected to all three trigger branches
how_to_edit: 1. Double-click the 'User Config (Master Profile)' node in the n8n workflow editor
2. You'll see a JavaScript code block with a return statement
3. Replace the example values in the json object with your actual information from this template
4. Keep the structure exactly the same - only change the values inside quotes and arrays
5. Click 'Execute Node' to test - you should see your config data in the output
